description: Composition Melange grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a ribbed neckline and distressed look appliqued lettering on the chest Fitting Fitted Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print or embroidery The distressed look appliqued lettering on the chest adds rugged styling to this T-shirt from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans, tees and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
